title: The Copper Age Panorama
description: Have to give it to Mojang, they sure know how to make technological updates. I love the new golems. And the new chests. And the new blocks. But now? I can have them in my main menu - and so can you!
body:
# Copper Galore at your demand!
Have to give it to Mojang, they sure know how to make technological updates. 

I love the new golems. And the new chests. And the new blocks.

But now? I can have them in my main menu - and so can you!

![The Copper Age Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab5489df6cec0d208d762ae145e9fdeb6f1fdd43.webp)

# Features
- Single prerendered panorama of a trial chamber scene for your main menu

# Not your cup of tea?
Feel free to check out [other panoramas](https://modrinth.com/user/Lumora) that I made for you!
